summary: Paint Shop Iteration 18 - Ultra-realistic photorealistic truck images testing COMPLETE. All features verified: GPT Image 1 generated trucks with pure black backgrounds, dual-layer color system (multiply + color blend at 60% opacity), all 6 truck models, color application with NO background bleed, draggable text, wrap patterns, extras, finish types, save/load persistence.
critical_code_review_comments: Dual-layer color system working correctly: multiply blend kills background, color blend at 60% opacity adds vivid hue
All 6 truck models (truck_01 through truck_06) load correctly with photorealistic images
Background stays pure black (rgb(0,0,0)) when colors are applied - NO BLEED confirmed for red, blue, green
DraggableElement component working - text can be repositioned via mouse drag
Backend TruckDesign model includes all fields and returns them correctly in API responses
Save/Reset/Persistence all working correctly with toast notifications
test_credentials: No authentication required for Paint Shop features
seed_data_creation: Test truck designs created via API tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Paint Shop ultra-realistic truck images verified. Dual-layer color system (multiply + color at 0.6 opacity) working correctly. All 6 truck models load. Background stays pure black with no color bleed. Draggable text, wraps, extras, finishes all working. Save/load persistence verified.

1_Photorealistic_Truck_Image.details: Paint Shop loads with photorealistic truck image (GPT Image 1 generated) on pure black background

2_All_6_Truck_Models.details: All 6 chassis models load correctly: Classic Step Van, Modern Sprinter, Large Box Truck, Compact Transit, Retro Airstream, Open-Air Trailer

3_Red_Color_No_Bleed.details: Signal Red (#CE2029) applied to truck body with vivid color, background stays pure black (rgb(0,0,0))

4_Blue_Color_No_Bleed.details: Royal Blue (#4169E1) applied to truck body with vivid color, background stays pure black

5_Green_Color_No_Bleed.details: Forest Green (#228B22) applied to truck body with vivid color, background stays pure black

6_Draggable_Text.details: Business name entered in Text tab, appears on truck, successfully dragged from x=562 to x=549 (repositioned)

7_Wrap_Patterns.details: Carbon Fiber and Diagonal Stripes wraps selectable and visible on truck body

8_Extras_All_4.details: All 4 extras (Awning, LED Underglow, Roof Signage, Racing Stripe) toggle ON with visible effects

9_Finish_Types.details: Matte and Chrome finishes selectable with visible CSS filter changes

10_Save_Design.details: Save Design button works, toast shows 'Design saved successfully!'

11_Reset_Design.details: Reset Design button works, toast shows 'Design reset to defaults', truck returns to white/no accessories

12_Backend_POST_Full_Payload.details: POST /api/truck-designs with full payload returns all fields correctly including lettering_x, lettering_y, racing_stripe_color, etc.

13_Backend_GET_Latest.details: GET /api/truck-designs/latest returns latest saved design with all fields
